header.name: Sijoy Almeida
header.tagline: Founder, JoSho IT Solutions — Your One Stop IT Solution

value_proposition: Full-service IT infrastructure for small businesses. CCTV, POS, networking, automation, web development. One team, one point of contact, enterprise-grade results at SMB-friendly pricing.

services.name: CCTV & Surveillance
services.description: Complete security camera systems — site survey, installation, remote monitoring setup. IP cameras, NVR/DVR, night vision.

services.name: POS & Business Systems
services.description: Point-of-sale setup, configuration, inventory integration, payment processing, reporting dashboards.

services.name: Networking & Infrastructure
services.description: LAN/WAN design, Ethernet cabling, WiFi deployment, router/firewall configuration, VPN setup. Single office to multi-location.
services.clients_served: Scaled from 1 to 3 office locations for CLC Abroad

services.name: CRM & Automation
services.description: WhatsApp API integration, lead management, automated follow-ups, email workflows. Built system processing 1,000+ leads/month.

services.name: Web Development
services.description: Business websites, web applications, custom software. React, Node.js, AWS. From landing pages to full-stack platforms.

services.name: IT Support & Maintenance
services.description: Ongoing support with SLA-backed response times. P1 Critical: 4hr. P2 High: same day. Remote + on-site.
services.clients_served: All active clients on monthly retainer

case_study.challenge: 3-person startup needed complete IT infrastructure to scale operations across 3 offices
case_study.solution: Built LAN/WAN across 3 offices, CCTV surveillance, CRM automation with WhatsApp API processing 1,000+ leads/month, website, and ongoing IT support — all for ₹20,000/month

process.description: We listen. Understand your business, pain points, budget. No generic pitch.
Clear scope, clear pricing, clear timeline. No hidden fees.
Hands-on execution. Cables run, cameras mounted, systems configured.
Full walkthrough, documentation, training. Then ongoing SLA-backed support.

credentials.location: Boston, MA — serving Boston metro and Maine
